  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src_4:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/JsonConfig \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bookworm-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/Kartographer mediawiki/extensions/Scribunto mediawiki/extensions/VisualEditor mediawiki/extensions/WikimediaMessages

To address all issues possible (including breaking changes), run:
  npm audit fix --force

Some issues need review, and may require choosing
a different dependency.

Run `npm audit` for details.

  --rm \

  --resolve-requires \
  --command true

  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src_4:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/VisualEditor \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bookworm-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/Cite mediawiki/extensions/ConfirmEdit mediawiki/extensions/DiscussionTools mediawiki/extensions/FlaggedRevs mediawiki/extensions/Linter mediawiki/extensions/TemplateData

########################################
docker run \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src_4:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/WikimediaMessages \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bookworm-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/cldr
